tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All parameters are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated HbA1c (6.4%), indicating impaired glucose tolerance or possible early diabetes. Renal function and electrolytes are normal. Recommend clinical correlation for glycemic control and consideration of lifestyle modification or further evaluation for diabetes.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
